title: 40cm x 30cm Clear Acrylic Serving Tray with Golden Handles, Decorative Trays Sturdy Huge Capacity Acrylic Tray for Kitchen and Desk Organizer, Storage Tray (40cm x 30cm x 5cm)
features: The tray is made of high-quality acrylic

Multi-function Usage: This clear tray have 3 size to choose. We have small, medium, large different capacity can meet all your needs. Suitable for your home, bars, workplace use. Perfect for makeup table tray, nightstand tray, coffee, and tea snack serving tray, even use for bathroom decoration tray. Keep your home organized.

Leak-proof Design: With fully sealed corners and an external curved handle design, you can easily and safely move the tray from the kitchen to the living room. Without worrying about the food spilling during the party, the juice splashing, and staining your clothes, so as to keep your happy mood.

Classic Appearance: The overall design follows the classic fully transparent rectangular shape and the simple and stylish golden handle design, which is perfectly integrated with your home, making your home look more tidy and attractive, and it will also attract friends and family love.

Quality Guaranty: If there occurs some broken or damaged in transit, we will either replace it or refund your money. Any OTHER problems or questions, please feel free to contact us. We will try our best to solve it. Wish you a happy shopping!
description: Product Description The Acrylic serving Tray with Handles allows you to easily move your Decorative Items to the side of the bed, giving your partner a surprise in life. It can be placed in the bedroom, living room, desk It is used to store daily necessities, etc. Acacia tray with handles present a rustic yet modern design that brings a unique charm to your home. Multi size acrylic decorative tray The package includes: Rectangular tray x 1; Two metal handles x 2; Product dimensions: 28cm*36cm*5cm 30cm*30cm*5cm 30*cm*40cm*5cm Convenient Handle and Acrylic Materal: This Decorative Tray contains two handles for easy handling and transport. Multipurpose Tray The Decorative Tray is not only used as serving tray for bed breakfast, desserts, drink. But also perfect use as ottoman tray, vanity tray, for guest towels, tea set, jewelry, perfume bottles, hair brushes, cosmetics, candles and bathroom accessories. Various Home Decor: This is a table centerpieces tray for coffee table, dinner room table. Also it is a good home decor choice fireplace mantle, dining room table, living room, foyer, console, parlor, study and bar table to creat a modern farmhouse home decoration style.
